termination_claim: outer loop eventually processes all indices
failure_mode: index update bug can prevent progress

termination_claim: each iteration removes at least one candidate
failure_mode: midpoint or bound update bug can keep interval unchanged

termination_claim: recursive calls eventually reach singleton or empty lists
failure_mode: bad split can repeat same-size subproblem

termination_claim: visited set prevents repeated infinite traversal
failure_mode: missing visited set can loop in cyclic graphs

termination_claim: bubble-up eventually reaches root or valid parent
failure_mode: invalid parent indexing can break progress
